name: alterlab-squidpy-spatial
description: Analyzes spatial transcriptomics with squidpy (1.8.x) on AnnData and SpatialData objects, routing platforms correctly: Visium spots use spatial_neighbors(coord_type='grid') and pair with deconvolution, while Xenium/MERFISH single-cell data use coord_type='generic'/Delaunay neighbors and spatialdata-io readers (xenium, visium_hd, merscope). Runs sq.gr.spatial_neighbors, nhood_enrichment, co_occurrence, spatial_autocorr (Moran's I for spatially variable genes), ripley, and ligrec. Use when the use
author: AlterLab-IEU
